rulings.Case Title: RICHARD SHARP VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant United Refrigeration, Inc. To Produce Its Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, And To Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel defendant United Refrigeration, Inc. to produce its custodian(s) of records and person(s) most knowledgeable for deposition, and to produce documents at deposition. After the motion and opposition were filed, defendant produced Mr. Carmen Carosella for deposition on July 13. If the parties have not resolved all issues raised by the motion, they must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:00 p.m. today specifying, without argument, what issues remain and then appear at the scheduled hearing. Both parties¿ requests for sanctions are denied. = (220/HEK)
